page: Microsoft Azure M176s_4_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the MSMediumMemoryv3 family. It features 176 dedicated virtual CPUs managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 3892.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of approximately 22.11 GB per vCPU.

This server configuration does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external volumes, though the instance is Premium Storage capable. There are no graphics processing units bundled with this instance, and it does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the massive memory allocation relative to the vCPU count, this instance represents a high-density memory-optimized hardware profile. It is qualitatively structured for memory-intensive enterprise workloads that require substantial RAM capacity without local disk overhead. Appropriate workloads include large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy data analytics pipelines.
description: Microsoft Azure M176s_4_v3 is a memory-optimized server from the MSMediumMemoryv3 family, built on the x86_64 architecture and managed by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 176 dedicated vCPUs and a massive 3892.0 GB of system memory, providing a high resource density of 22.11 GB of RAM per core. The server does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable, relying on external network storage for data persistence. With zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses, it is designed for secure, internal enterprise environments. This hardware profile is engineered for large-scale, memory-intensive workloads such as in-memory databases, large enterprise applications, and complex data analytics pipelines that require substantial memory capacity without the need for local physical disks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M176s_4_v3 is a memory-optimized server featuring 176 dedicated vCPUs, 3892.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, designed for large-scale in-memory databases and enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized virtual server featuring massive memory capacity and dedicated virtual processors for demanding enterprise database workloads.
